system.error_start: ❌ Error executing /start, please try again later.
system.no_active_issue: There is no active Issue currently. Please use /new to create one.

help.title: 🦞 {repoFullName}
help.welcome:
Hi! I am your Lobster butler.
Just send me commands, and I'll handle everything.
help.list_desc: /list      List all active Lobsters on duty
help.status_desc: /status    Show status summary of active Lobster

skills.installed_preview:
📦 *{skillName}* ✅ (Installed){description}

This skill is installed on {target}, select action:
skills.preview:
📦 *{skillName}*{description}

Do you want to install this skill on {target}?
skills.confirm_overwrite: ⚠️ Skill *{skillName}* is already installed on {target}, overwrite?
skills.need_envs:
🔑 Skill *{skillName}* needs environment variables

Please enter the value for *{envName}*

({currentIndex}/{totalLength})
skills.failed_message: ❌ Skill *{name}* {action} failed, please check the workflow run log

schedule.no_active_lobster: There is no active Lobster currently. Please use /new to create one.
schedule.view_details_or_delete: Click the button below to view details or delete the schedule.
schedule.parseErrorDl: I didn't understand this schedule time. Please describe it in a clearer way.
schedule.parseErrorNf: I can't determine this schedule time right now. Please try again later or describe it in a clearer way.
schedule.parseErrorSf: I'm not quite sure which schedule time you mean. Please describe it again using a full sentence.
schedule.examples: tonight at 6pm, tomorrow at 8am, every 5 minutes, every hour on the hour, daily at 12pm, every Monday at 2pm, weekdays at 2pm, weekends at 9am, daily at 9:00, 12:00, 18:00
schedule.manage_instruction: Please click the buttons below to manage a specific schedule.
schedule.ask_prompt: What task would you like this lobster to execute periodically? (Prompt for Lobster)
schedule.edit_prompt_fraction: ✏️ (1/2) Enter new task content for schedule {id} (Prompt for Lobster)
schedule.edit_time_fraction: 🕒 (1/2) Enter new execution time for schedule {id}
schedule.ask_time: Got it! When would you like to run this schedule?
schedule.payload_enter_prompt: Enter new Payload content directly, or click 'Skip' to clear.
schedule.payload_description: If a JSON object is entered, the original event_data is kept on trigger and expanded into workflow inputs.
schedule.chat_list_instruction: Please click the buttons below to view details or delete a schedule.
schedule.closed_lobster_cleanup_hint: If this schedule was left behind by a lobster that has already checked out, you can delete it directly from here.
schedule.list_failed: ❌ Failed to retrieve schedule list, please try again later.
schedule.time_already_passed: This time has already passed. Please change it to a future time.
schedule.status_lost: ⚠️ Schedule setting state lost, please configure the schedule again.
schedule.create_failed: ❌ Failed to create schedule, please try again later.
schedule.not_found_reopen: ⚠️ Specified schedule not found. Please reopen schedule management.
schedule.prompt_cannot_be_empty: Schedule task cannot be empty. Please enter new task content (Prompt for Lobster).
schedule.ask_payload: Please set Payload data for this schedule? (Optional)
schedule.ask_payload_hint: Enter Payload content directly, or click 'Skip' to skip this step.
schedule.issueNotFoundOrClosed: ⚠️ Issue not found or has been closed
schedule.lobster_closed_only_delete: ⚠️ The lobster for this schedule has checked out. It can only be deleted.
schedule.not_in_payload_step: ⚠️ Currently not in Payload configuration step

kb.closeCancel: Not yet, let it swim a bit longer

newFlow.workflowEnabledOn: Enabled (tasks will be dispatched to this lobster)
newFlow.workflowEnabledOff: Disabled (only collects data to the Issue)
newFlow.keepNameHint: 👆 Tap "Keep Name" to keep the current value, or "Cancel" to stop.
newFlow.enterNameExample: e.g. Bookkeeping Lobster, Invoice Sorter, Customer Support
newFlow.keepDescriptionHint: 👆 Tap "Keep Description" to keep the current value, or "Cancel" to stop.
newFlow.enterDescriptionExample: e.g. track daily expenses, categorize invoices, output bookkeeping summaries
newFlow.selectTemplate: 📦 Please select a template for this lobster
newFlow.selectTemplateHint: 👇 Tap a button below to choose a template.
newFlow.workflowEnabledHint: 👇 This step is equivalent to /enable and /disable — you can also just tap a button.
newFlow.resetTemplateHint1: Choosing a template will overwrite the current one.
newFlow.resetTemplateHint2: If you don't need to reset it, just tap "⏭️ Skip".
newFlow.stateInvalid: ⚠️ The setup flow state is invalid — please start over with /new.
newFlow.useButtonsTemplate: ⚠️ Please use the buttons below to choose a template, or tap "Cancel" to stop.
newFlow.useButtonsTemplateReset: ⚠️ Please use the buttons below to choose a template, or tap "Skip".
newFlow.updatingPleaseWait: ⚠️ Update in progress — please wait and avoid submitting again.
newFlow.enterEnableDisable: ⚠️ Please type "enable / disable", or use the buttons below to choose the dispatch status.
newFlow.updateErrorRetryEdit: ❌ Something went wrong updating the lobster — please try /edit again.
newFlow.formExpiredEdit: ⚠️ This form has expired — please use /new or /edit again
newFlow.buttonExpiredRetry: ⚠️ This button has expired — please try again
newFlow.updateErrorGeneric: ❌ Something went wrong updating the lobster.
newFlow.templateListReadFailedRetry: ⚠️ Couldn't read the template list right now — please try again later
newFlow.templateNoLongerExists: ⚠️ This template no longer exists — please choose again
newFlow.templateNotInLobster: ⚠️ Template "{template}" is not currently available — please choose again.
newFlow.noEnvVarsNeeded: No environment variables need to be set
newFlow.completionError: ⚠️ Something went wrong finishing up the lobster — please try again later.
newFlow.noActiveLobster: ⚠️ No active lobster right now — use /new to create one or /list to pick one.
newFlow.readIssueFailedRetry: ❌ Failed to read the Issue data — please try again later.
newFlow.notCreatedByNewFlow: ⚠️ The currently active Issue wasn't created via /new, so it can't be edited with /edit right now.
newFlow.noTemplatesInstalled: ⚠️ No templates are installed in Lobster Castle yet — please install some with /templates first.
newFlow.errorTemplateNotInstalled: ❌ Template not installed in Lobster Castle
newFlow.errorCreateFailed: ❌ An error occurred while creating the lobster.

access.notFullyConfigured: ⚠️ The bot's authorization isn't fully configured yet — please set TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_FROM_ID and TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_CHAT_ID first.
access.privateOnly: This bot only accepts private chats.
access.messageTooLong: Message too long — limit is {max} characters.

core.noLobstersYet: 🦞 No lobsters yet — use /new to create one.
core.currentActiveNotFound: 🦞 The current record is #{number}, but it's not in the list right now (may have been closed).
core.startError: ❌ Something went wrong running /start — please try again later.
core.listErrorUnauthorized: ❌ /list: Unable to read GitHub issues. Please check if CLAW_SYS_GITHUB_TOKEN has read access to Issues.
core.listErrorNotFound: ❌ /list: Target GitHub repository not found. Please check GITHUB_OWNER and GITHUB_REPO settings.
core.listErrorGeneric: ❌ Something went wrong running /list — please try again later.
core.noTrackedLobster: 🦞 No lobsters are currently being tracked. Use /new to create one first.
core.statusError: ❌ Something went wrong checking the lobster's status — please try again later.
core.closeNoOpenLobsters: 🦞 No lobsters are currently active. Everyone has checked out safely, so you can relax!
core.closeOnlyOneLobsterLeft: 🦞 Only one lobster left! I'll keep it active for now to prevent the entire pool from shutting down.
core.closeWhichLobster: 🦞 Which lobster would you like to check out first?
core.closeConfirmHint: Tap one, and I'll confirm with you again so it doesn't get shut down abruptly.
core.closeError: ❌ Something went wrong running /close — please try again later.
core.noActiveLobsterSelected: ⚠️ No lobster selected. Please use /list to select one first.
core.workflowNoInputs: - This workflow has no additional input parameters.
core.workflowProvideInputsPrompt: Please provide these values using natural language and submit again.
core.listMenuExpired: ⚠️ The list menu has expired, please run /list again.
core.lobsterNotOpen: ⚠️ This lobster is not currently active. Please run /list to confirm.
core.closeMenuExpired: ⚠️ The close menu has expired, please run /close again.
core.lastLobsterMustKeep: 🦞 The last lobster must be kept active
core.closeOnlyOneLobsterLeftMessage: 🦞 This is the last active lobster. I won't close it for now, as keeping one active is safer.
core.lobsterAlreadyClosed: ⚠️ This lobster may have already been closed. Please run /close to check the latest list.
core.closeConfirmAnswer: 🥺 Let me confirm with you one more time
core.closeConfirmQuestion: 🥺 Are you sure you want to close {target}?
core.closeConfirmDescription: It has worked very hard. If you just want to put it aside, we can always come back and look after it later.
core.closeCancelAnswer: 🫶 Okay, I'll let it keep swimming
core.closeCancelMessage: 🦞 Received, keeping lobster #{number} open. Let it swim a bit longer, and call me when you want to check it out.
core.closeCancelMessageGeneric: 🦞 Received, keeping this lobster open for now.
core.closeAlreadyClosedMessage: 🦞 I just checked, and this lobster is no longer active. Run /close to check the latest list.
core.closeAnswer: 🫶 Lobster has safely finished its work
core.closeNextActiveIssueSwitched: I've switched the active lobster to ✅ lobster #{number} for you. Let's continue taking care of the next one.
core.closeNextActiveIssueSame: The currently active lobster is still lobster #{number}. Let's continue taking care of it.
core.closeNoMoreActiveIssues: No more active lobsters right now. Everyone can take a breather.
core.closeClearedSchedules: I've also cleared {count} schedules to prevent this closed lobster from being woken up for work.
core.closeNoSchedulesToClear: This lobster left no schedules behind, so no cleanup is needed.
core.resetTemplateWarning: Resetting will overwrite the current template with the selected one.
core.resetTemplateFailedAnswer: ⚠️ Reset failed, please try again later
core.restingMessage2: I have saved your message, it won't be lost.
core.restingMessage3: If you want to wake it up immediately, please use /enable.
core.noTaskMessage1: Currently no tasks are configured for the lobster, but I will still record your message.
core.noTaskMessage2: If you need the lobster to perform tasks later, just update the configuration via /edit.
core.mediaNotAccepted: 🦞 Please enter text directly in this field, media messages are not accepted.
core.useTextInSchedule: ⚠️ Please use text replies in schedule configuration
core.noActiveIssueWarn: ⚠️ No active issue found. Please use /new to create a new one first.
core.coreUpdateFailed: ❌ Core update failed. Please check the workflow run log.
core.coreUpdateEnded: ℹ️ Core update process ended. Result: {result}
core.workflowNotCreatedYet: ℹ️ Lobster {number} has not set up a workflow yet ({name} does not exist).
core.workflowInferParamsError: ❌ Failed to infer parameters for workflow `{name}`.
core.workflowEnabledMessage: ✅ Workflow {name} has been enabled. Lobster {number} will now automatically accept dispatches.
core.workflowDisabledMessage: ✅ Workflow {name} has been disabled. Lobster {number} will not accept dispatches for now.

templates.desc_default: Template for general tasks, suitable for most development and automation workflows.
templates.desc_summary: Template focused on summarizing, organizing, and key point extraction tasks.
templates.desc_image_generation: Template focused on image generation, asset production, and visual tasks.
templates.sync_desc: Sync templates/{name} to the current project.
templates.selectInstallTo: 📚 Select templates to install into Lobster Castle
templates.installed_message:
✅ Template *{name}* has been installed into Lobster Castle.

🦞 Now you can create a new lobster using /new!
templates.failed_message: ❌ Template *{name}* deployment failed, please check the workflow run log
templates.sync_complete_ask_line:
✅ Template *{name}* has been installed successfully!

🤖 Would you like to continue configuring LINE Bot deployment?

line.skipped_install_message:
✅ Template *line-bot* has been installed successfully!

You can trigger the `install-line-bot` workflow manually to deploy later.
